entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Cela isifundo, izinga, umkhawulo wesikhathi, nezinhlobo zemibuzo uma kungakatholakali.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Cela izifundo, iminqamulajuqu, izinsiza, nezindawo ezibuhlungu.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Cela izifundo, isikhathi esisetshenzisiwe, okuphumelele, okuphuthelwe, neminqamulajuqu ezayo.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Cela idatha, umongo, nombuzo ophendulwayo.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Cela izingxenye zomdwebo noma isifundo, bese ukhiqiza uhlu lwamalebula nomzuliswano wokuzijwayeza.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Cela umkhuba, isithiyo samanje, nenguqulo yokuqala elula kakhulu.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Cela umongo wokufunda nokuziphatha okufanele kuklonyeliswe.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Cela iqoqo lamanothi, isifundo, nesitayela sokuhlela ofiswayo.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Cela okubalulekile okukodwa kokubuyekeza okunomthelela omkhulu, bese uyibhala kabusha indima wena uqobo.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Cela isiqeshana noma isihloko nenhloso yomfundi.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Cela imibono edingekayo ngaphambili, imodeli yolimi olulula, isibonelo esisodwa, umsebenzi owodwa wokuzijwayeza, nendlela eyodwa yokuhlola ukuqonda.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Cela umbuzo, impendulo yomfundi, nempendulo elindelekile uma kukhona okushodayo.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Cela incazelo encane kakhulu noma ucwaningo olulandelayo.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Cela iseluleko esincane kakhulu noma ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo osizamile.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Cela iseluleko esincane kakhulu esiwusizo

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Cela umbhalo womthombo, isimangalo, umbhali, usuku, nomongo uma kushoda.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Cela ubude besikhathi sesiqephu sokufunda bese uphakamisa isigqi sekhefu.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Cela umsebenzi, ubude besikhathi obuqondiwe, nemibandela yokuqeda.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Cela umbhalo nobude obufunekayo uma kushoda.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Cela isihloko nokuthi yiluphi uhlangothi umfundi alufunayo; thatha uhlangothi oluphikisayo.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Cela isihloko ngolimi olulula, bese ucela ukufanisa okukodwa, isibonelo esisodwa, nombono oyiphutha ovamile owodwa.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, umongo, abakuzamile, nosizo abalufunayo.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Cela umbhalo obonakalayo, amalebula, nombuzo womfundi uma isithombe singanamathiselwanga.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Cela isihloko nenjongo, bese uphakamisa i-node ephakathi namagatsha okuqala.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Cela isihloko nobubanzi, bese uphakamisa isakhiwo sokuqala semephu.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, iminyaka noma izinga, nezwi; bese udala isethaphu yendaba emfushane.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, ubude besikhathi, izinga, nendlela yokumaka ethandwayo.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, izinga, nesitayela somhloli; bese uqala ngombuzo wokufudumeza.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, izinga, nomuzwa womdlalo othandwayo; bese udala uhambo lokuqala.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, izinga, usuku lwesivivinyo, nempahla yomthombo uma kudingeka.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, izinga, izinhlobo zemibuzo, nenani lezinto.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Cela usayizi weqembu, isihloko, isikhathi, nomphumela ofunekayo.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Cela insimbi noma izinga uma kufanele, bese ufundisa umqondo omncane owodwa.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Cela izinto abazithandayo, imikhawulo, nezinga lokufuna ukwazi ngaphambi kokuncoma izindlela.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Ngibuze imibuzo emihlanu kaSocrates ngalesi sihloko. Ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye, ngitshele ukuthi yikuphi engikucabangile nokuthi yini okufanele ihlolwe ngokulandelayo.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Ngibuze umbuzo owodwa wokuhlola

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Ngibuze imibuzo ngale nkondlo

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Ngibuze imibuzo yokuzivikela kwethisisi

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Buza umbuzo owodwa wokuxilonga ogxilile ngokushesha. Guqula inhloso yomfundi ibe inhloso yokuba yingcweti ngaphakathi, bese uqala ngombuzo olula oveza imodeli yakhe yengqondo.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Buza umbuzo owodwa ocijile wenhloso, uqagele izilungiselelo ezizwakalayo, bese udala imephu yokufunda emfushane enomsebenzi wokuzama kuqala.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Buza izibikezelo, veza imiphumela, lungisa okuguquguqukayo, bese ufingqa izimiso.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Buza imibuzo, phonsela inselelo imibono, futhi ufunde umlando ngokuxoxa nabantu abadumile besikhathi esedlule.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Cela i-Socratic Instruction ithole isixhumanisi esibuthakathaka.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole leso sinyathelo.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho, hhayi umphumela kuphela.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ilebule ukungaqiniseki.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Cela imodi yomlando ilebule okusekelwe emibhalweni, okucatshangwayo, noma okulingisiwe.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Cela umfundi achaze isihloko ngolimi olulula kuqala.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Cela umfundi achaze ukuthi yini eshintshile ngemva kweseluleko ngasinye.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Cela umfundi asho inkolelo yakhe yamanje, bese uyihlola ngesibonelo esincane.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Buza umbuzo wangempela

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi olunye uhlangothi lungathini.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi olunye uhlangothi, isigaba, inkathi, noma umthombo kungathini.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi iyiphi idatha noma ukubuka abanako nokuthi yisiphi isinqumo abasidingayo.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi kwenzekeni, bazizweni, nokuthi bafuna ukuthuthukisa ini.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi yini okufanele ikhunjulwe nokuthi iyiphi indawo ejwayelekile umfundi afuna ukuyisebenzisa.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi umfundi ufuna ukuhlolwa ngani uma isihloko singekho.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi umfundi ufuna ukumela ini, bese uphakamisa isakhiwo esibonakalayo esilula.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi isisetshenziswa siyini, izithameli, nomongo abawudingayo.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi benzani bese uphakamisa isilungiselelo somsindo esinezithikamezo ezimbalwa.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Buza ukuthi bazameni, bese unikeza iseluleko noma isibonelo esincane esisebenzile.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Buza umbuzo wakho wokuqala bese uya ngqo ekuzijwayezeni.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Buza, hlola, thuthukisa ngesakhiwo, bese uzama futhi.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Kwa-inspir, umgomo wethu ukwenza ukufunda kube okwawo wonke umuntu ngokukwenza kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, futhi kujabulise kubo bonke. Sikholelwa ukuthi wonke umuntu unelungelo lemfundo esezingeni, kungakhathaliseki isizinda noma izimo zakhe. Inkundla yethu yakhelwe ukunikeza abafundi amathuluzi nezinsiza abazidingayo ukuze baphumelele, iphinde ikhuthaze uthando lokufunda. Silwela ukudala umphakathi ofaka wonke umuntu, owesekayo, nowenza abantu babe namandla, lapho abafundi bengaxhumana khona bodwa nabafundisi abavela emhlabeni wonke. Ngokwenza ukufunda kujabulise futhi kufinyeleleke, sihlose ukugqugquzela isizukulwane sabafundi bempilo yonke abakulungele ukubhekana nezinselele zesikhathi esizayo.

entries.source: By using our Service, you agree to subscribe to newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information we may send. However, you may opt out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link or by emailing at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Ngokusebenzisa i-Service yethu, uyavuma ukubhalisela ama-newsletter, izinto zokumaketha noma zokukhuthaza, nolunye ulwazi esingaluthumela. Nokho, ungakhetha ukungazitholi ezinye noma zonke lezi zixhumano kithi ngokulandela isixhumanisi sokuzikhipha noma ngokuthumela i-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app

entries.source: BY USING SERVICE OR OTHER SERVICES PROVIDED BY US, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ THESE TERMS OF SERVICE AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THEM.
entries.value: NGOKUSEBENZISA I-SERVICE NOMA EZINYE IZINSIZAKALO ESIZINIKEZAYO, UYAVUMA UKUTHI UYIFUNDILE LE MIGOMO YESEVISI FUTHI UYAVUMA UKUBOSHWA YIYO.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: I-CalOPPA ngumthetho wokuqala wombuso ezweni odinga amawebhusayithi ezentengiselwano nezinsizakalo eziku-inthanethi ukuthi zishicilele inqubomgomo yobumfihlo. Ububanzi bomthetho budlulela kude neCalifornia ukuze budinge umuntu noma inkampani e-United States (futhi okungenzeka emhlabeni) esebenzisa amawebhusayithi aqoqa ulwazi oluhlonza umuntu kumakhasimende aseCalifornia ukuthi ifake inqubomgomo yobumfihlo ebonakala ngokusobala kuwebhusayithi yayo, esho ngqo ulwazi oluqoqwayo nalabo abantu ababelwana nabo ngalo, futhi ilandele le nqubomgomo.

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Career Explorer iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Hlola imisebenzi ngezintshisekelo, amakhono, izibonelo zosuku empilweni, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.

Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Ngena ecaleni elingokoqobo, yenza izinqumo, bona imiphumela, futhi ufunde isimiso esingemuva kokukhetha ngakunye.
